LanguageData.SoS2ShuttleUpgradeTree.nodes.0.descripti: Retrofit the shuttle's hull to minimize weight, trading armor for speed and fuel efficiency.\n<color=#bb8f04>-5 blunt armor, -3 sharp armor, +6 flight speed, +100 cargo capacity, -10 fuel consumption rate</color>
Retrofit the shuttle's hull with additional armor plating.\n<color=#bb8f04>+12 blunt armor, +8 sharp armor, -6 flight speed, -250 cargo capacity, +10 fuel consumption rate</color>
Apply a layer of vibrating mechanite chains which helps to diffuse blunt impacts.\n<color=#bb8f04>+6 blunt armor, +4 sharp armor, -50 cargo capacity</color>

[HUMAN CARAPACE
FROM THIS COCOON I EMERGE
TO WEAVE ONE STRONGER]
<color=#bb8f04>+45 blunt armor, +13 sharp armor</color>
